pi_items.source: Task specification in task.json description. This is the expected title the agent should create, not a claim about existing data.
Task specification in task.json description. This is the expected URL key the agent should create.
Task specification in task.json description. This is the expected h1 heading the agent should add to the page.

Verified against Magento 2 official widget configuration. This is the correct class path for the Catalog New Products List widget as defined in vendor/magento/module-catalog/etc/widget.xml with id='new_products'. References: GitHub Magento2 repository and Adobe Commerce documentation.

Verified as valid widget parameter. The products_count parameter is defined in Magento's widget.xml for the new_products widget. The value '6' is arbitrary but valid (default is 10). Verified through Magento widget configuration documentation and GitHub repository.

privileged_info_summary: The task involves creating a CMS page titled 'New Arrivals Showcase' with URL key 'new-arrivals-showcase' in a synthetic Magento 2.4.7 environment. The page should contain an h1 heading 'Fresh Finds for the Season', a paragraph, and an embedded widget of type Magento\Catalog\Block\Product\Widget\NewWidget configured to display 6 products using the New Products Grid Template. All metadata values are verified against Magento's official widget configuration and task specifications.
